---
title: "LikeHim"
author: "Joey Frost-Xenopoulos - 0730136"
date: "2025-02-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r, fig.height = 9}
# List all .tif files in the directory
server_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_SERVER_DIR", unset = "D:/SERVER/1902"),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)
timing_ticks_dir <- file.path(server_dir, "TimingTicks")

tif_files <- list.files(server_dir, pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
tif_files_sans_ext <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(tif_files)
basenames <- sub("^AGC-D-", "", basename(tif_files_sans_ext))

# Exclude specific basenames
basenames <- basenames[!basenames %in% c("19020925-19020926", "19021106-19021107")]

# Initialize variables to store combined data
all_x_top <- numeric(0)
all_y_top <- numeric(0)
all_x_bot <- numeric(0)
all_y_bot <- numeric(0)

# Initialize offset for alternating traces
offset <- 0

# Loop through each file
for (i in seq_along(basenames)) {
  # Construct paths to the RDS files
  rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0("AGC-D-", basenames[i], ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
  tt_path <- file.path(timing_ticks_dir, paste0("AGC-D-", basenames[i], ".rds"))
  
  cat("Processing:", basenames[i], "\n")
  
  # Read the RDS files
  img_rds <- tryCatch(readRDS(rds_path), error = function(e) NULL)
  tt <- tryCatch(readRDS(tt_path), error = function(e) NULL)
  
  if (is.null(img_rds) || is.null(tt)) {
    cat("Skipping", basenames[i], "due to missing or corrupted RDS files\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Extract the top and bottom traces
  Top_Trace <- img_rds$TopTraceMatrix
  Bot_Trace <- img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix
  
  # Skip this basename if Top_Trace or Bot_Trace is NULL
  if (is.null(Top_Trace) || is.null(Bot_Trace)) {
    cat("Skipping", basenames[i], "because Top_Trace or Bot_Trace is NULL\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Extract the X values for the top and bottom traces
  tt_top <- tt[[2]][["median_X"]]
  tt_bot <- tt[[1]][["median_X"]]
  
  # Function to sample points from a trace
  sample_trace <- function(trace, tt_x) {
    regions <- list()
    for (j in 1:(length(tt_x) + 1)) {
      if (j == 1) {
        region_start <- 1
        region_end <- tt_x[j]
      } else if (j == length(tt_x) + 1) {
        region_start <- tt_x[j - 1]
        region_end <- length(trace)
      } else {
        region_start <- tt_x[j - 1]
        region_end <- tt_x[j]
      }
      
      # Generate 24 evenly spaced indices within the region
      sampled_indices <- round(seq(region_start, region_end, length.out = 24))
      sampled_points <- trace[sampled_indices]
      
      # Store the region and its sampled points
      regions[[j]] <- list(
        start = region_start,
        end = region_end,
        points = sampled_points,
        indices = sampled_indices
      )
    }
    return(regions)
  }
  
  # Sample points for top and bottom traces
  regions_top <- sample_trace(Top_Trace, tt_top)
  regions_bot <- sample_trace(Bot_Trace, tt_bot)
  
  # Combine sampled points and indices for this file
  file_sampled_indices_top <- unlist(lapply(regions_top, function(region) region$indices))
  file_sampled_points_top <- unlist(lapply(regions_top, function(region) region$points))
  file_sampled_indices_bot <- unlist(lapply(regions_bot, function(region) region$indices))
  file_sampled_points_bot <- unlist(lapply(regions_bot, function(region) region$points))
  
  # Calculate the vertical offset between the first points of the top and bottom traces
  vertical_offset <- file_sampled_points_bot[1] - file_sampled_points_top[1]
  
  # Apply the vertical offset to all top trace points
  file_sampled_points_top <- file_sampled_points_top + vertical_offset
  
  # Offset the X values for alternating traces
  if (i > 1) {
    if (i %% 2 == 0) {
      # For even indices (bottom trace), start at the last X value of the top trace
      offset <- max(all_x_top)
    } else {
      # For odd indices (top trace), start at the last X value of the bottom trace
      offset <- max(all_x_bot)
    }
  }
  
  # Add the offset to the sampled indices
  file_sampled_indices_top <- file_sampled_indices_top + offset
  file_sampled_indices_bot <- file_sampled_indices_bot + offset
  
  # Append to the combined dataset
  all_x_top <- c(all_x_top, file_sampled_indices_top)
  all_y_top <- c(all_y_top, file_sampled_points_top)
  all_x_bot <- c(all_x_bot, file_sampled_indices_bot)
  all_y_bot <- c(all_y_bot, file_sampled_points_bot)
}

# Plot all combined points
plot(all_x_bot, all_y_bot, 
     type = "l", col = "black", pch = 20, cex = 0.1, 
     xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", 
     main = "Combined Evenly Spaced Sampled Points (Top and Bottom Traces)")
lines(all_x_top, all_y_top, col = "black")
legend("topright", legend = c("Bottom Trace", "Top Trace"), col = c("black", "black"), lty = 1)
grid()
```
